title: Vademecum to guide the designers through PEB climate and cultural design
author: De Rosso, Larissa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Vade mecum for the design of Plus Energy Buildings (PEB) addresses all key topics to support designers, architects, and investors in working through the different steps of climate and cultural design. It collects the experience and results of the first direct application of a climate-cultural approach to building and system design, looks at the effectiveness and efficiency of some advanced technologies implementation and operation processes, suggests a checklist with the ambition of making the method used in H2020 Cultural-E project easily replicable by designers and other stakeholders in future PEB projects.
steps_raw: This Vade mecum for the design of Plus Energy Buildings (PEB) addresses all key topics to support designers, architects, and investors in working through the different steps of climate and cultural design. It collects the experience and results of the first direct application of a climate-cultural approach to building and system design, looks at the effectiveness and efficiency of some advanced technologies implementation and operation processes, suggests a checklist with the ambition of making the method used in H2020 Cultural-E project easily replicable by designers and other stakeholders in future PEB projects.
